subject: [PATCH 12/14] nfsd: add netlink upcall for the nfsd.fh cache

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: The patch series implements netlink-based cache upcall support for the nfsd.fh cache, including a new expkey attribute-set and operations to handle client requests and updates. The code adds a new enum value for expkey, a new attribute-set with fields for client, fsidtype, fsid, negative flag, expiry, and path, and two new operations to dump pending expkey requests and parse responses from userspace.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds netlink-based cache upcall support for the nfsd.fh cache, including a new expkey attribute-set and operations to handle client requests and updates.
